steps.title: Rewrite the inner expression
steps.content:
The expression inside the square can be rewritten as:
$$\frac{1}{2}x-\frac{29}{2}=\frac{x-29}{2}$$
So the equation becomes:
$$\frac{(x-29)^2}{4}-49=0$$

steps.title: Isolate the target value
steps.content:
Add $49$, then multiply by $4$:
$$\frac{(x-29)^2}{4}=49$$
$$(x-29)^2=196$$
The answer is D.
